name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Cash America Pawn, a FirstCash brand, operates pawn stores across the U.S. offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, and retail resale of secondhand goods.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is a retail pawn brand operating under FirstCash Holdings, Inc., the leading international operator of pawn stores headquartered at 1600 West 7th Street, Fort Worth, Texas. FirstCash acquired Cash America International in 2016, consolidating the brand into its network of more than 3,300 pawn and consumer lending locations spanning 29 U.S. states and the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America — including all Mexican states and the countries of Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador. The company is a component of the S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indexes, and employs approximately 22,000 people globally.

Cash America Pawn locations offer pawn loans: small, non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property such as jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Because these loans are non-recourse, the borrower's only obligation is to repay or forfeit the collateral — there is no credit check, no impact on credit scores, and no collections if the item is not redeemed. The stores also buy and sell secondhand merchandise outright, purchase gold, silver, and platinum for immediate cash, and offer a layaway program requiring 10% down on retail purchases. Parent company FirstCash also operates AFF, a lease-to-own and retail finance subsidiary with over 15,000 active merchant partners nationwide.

What sets Cash America Pawn apart within the pawn sector is the scale and consistency of its parent network. With thousands of locations, standardized processes, and a public company accountability structure, consumers get a more uniform experience than at independent pawn shops. The store locator covers over 2,500 North and Latin American locations, and the company's size means it can handle higher-value items and a broader range of merchandise categories than most local competitors.

For consumers who need fast cash without a credit check, Cash America Pawn is a legitimate, regulated option — but it comes with real costs. Pawn loan interest rates and fees vary by state and are typically high on an annualized basis. Items must be physically brought to the store, loan amounts are based on resale value (often a fraction of retail), and unredeemed items are sold. It is best used as a short-term bridge for people with tangible assets, not as a recurring borrowing strategy.
pros: Non-recourse pawn loans — no credit check, no collections, no credit score impact
Over 2,500 store locations across the U.S. and Latin America for easy access
Buys a wide range of items on the spot: jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments
Gold, silver, and platinum buying for immediate cash
Layaway plan available with 10% down — no interest financing for purchases
Publicly traded parent company (FirstCash, S&P MidCap 400) with regulatory oversight and standardized practices
Lease-to-own and retail finance options via AFF subsidiary at 15,000+ merchant locations
cons: Pawn loan amounts are based on resale value, typically a fraction of an item's retail or sentimental worth
Interest rates and fees on pawn loans are typically high on an annualized basis — varies by state law
Items not redeemed within the loan term are forfeited and sold — no partial credit or extensions guaranteed
No online loan process — requires in-person visit with physical collateral
Retail merchandise is secondhand and inventory varies unpredictably by location
best_for: Consumers who need fast cash and own jewelry, electronics, or tools but have poor or no credit
People seeking a short-term, no-credit-check loan without risk of collections or credit reporting
Bargain shoppers looking for secondhand electronics, jewelry, or sporting goods at below-retail prices
Individuals who want to sell gold, silver, or platinum quickly without going through a jeweler
diagnosis: Cash America Pawn is best for consumers who need immediate cash and have physical assets to pledge but cannot qualify for or do not want traditional credit products. The non-recourse structure means no collections risk, but loan values are low relative to item worth and fees are significant — it is a last-resort bridge, not a cost-effective borrowing strategy.
services: Pawn loans (non-recourse, collateral-based, no credit check)
Outright purchase of personal property for immediate cash
Retail sale of secondhand jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway plan (10% down on retail purchases)
Store locator for 2,500+ U.S. and Latin American locations
Lease-to-own payment solutions via AFF subsidiary
Retail finance point-of-sale solutions via AFF at 15,000+ merchant partners
